seoTitle: Keilira vs Kellidie Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Keilira and Kellidie Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Keilira vs Kellidie Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keilira and Kellidie Bay.
heading: Keilira vs Kellidie Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keilira, South Australia and Kellidie Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keilira has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kellidie Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keilira or Kellidie Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keilira has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Kellidie Bay scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keilira scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Kellidie Bay scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keilira or Kellidie Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keilira has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
